case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MARCELLINI, BONNIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $722.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARCELLINI, BONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCELLINI, BONNIE $722.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $748.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-27-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-01-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
